title: Carmex Classic Moisturising Lip Balm for Soft, Protected Lips with SPF 15 (10 gm each - Pack of 2)

features: CLASSIC MOISTURISING FORMULA - Formulated with deeply nourishing ingredients, the Carmex lip balm intensely hydrates, quickly banishing dryness and locking in moisture for soft, supple, healthy-looking lips.
SPF 15 PROTECTION - Protects your lips from harmful UVA and UVB rays with our SPF lip balm, ideal for year-round use. It’s the best SPF lip balm for maintaining healthy lips.

RAPID RELIEF - Offers immediate comfort to dry and chapped lips, providing fast-acting relief and repair that helps soothe and heal chapped lips with efficiency. A robust formula that not only restores your lips to their natural softness but also ensures long-lasting protection.
VERSATILE LIP CARE - Perfect as a hydrating base under lipstick or as a glossy top coat, this Carmex balm provides versatile options for both beauty enthusiasts and those seeking practical lip care.
TRUSTED BRAND - Rely on the heritage of Carmex, a trusted name in lip care for over 90 years, with its proven formula that has made it a favourite worldwide, selling over 130 units per minute.
description: Product Description A true lip hero! The CARMEX Classic Lip balm is bursting with lip nourishing ingredients, plus that iconic CARMEX tingle. Delivering a boost of lip-loving hydration, this little beauty quickly helps repair, relieve and restore lips whilst protecting them from drying out. The Carmex Classic Lip balm is not just a treat to your senses; it's packed with SPF15, ensuring your lips are shielded from the sun’s harmful rays, making it an indispensable spf lip balm for your summer adventures. Key Benefits: Ultimate Lip Hydration: This hydrating lip balm delivers deep moisture, providing fast acting relief, making it the best lip balm for dry or chapped lips. SPF Protection: Infused with SPF 15, our SPF lip balm shields your lips from harmful UV rays, securing its place as the best SPF lip balm for daily use. Nourishing Ingredients: Blended with a rich mix of natural emollients like lanolin and cocoa butter, this best moisturising lip balm keeps your lips soft and supple. Versatile Use: Perfect as a standalone lip moisturiser or under your favourite lipstick, our Carmex lip balm ensures your lips look and feel fabulous. Ingredients: Packed with lip nourishing ingredients like Petrolatum, Lanolin, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Benzophenone-3, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Cetyl Esters, Paraffin, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa Butter), Flavor, Camphor, Menthol, Stevia Rebaudiana Extract, Cinnamal, Eugenol. Directions: For best results, apply Carmex lip balm liberally to lips as needed, especially before sun exposure. Reapply our SPF lip balm after swimming or sweating, and use it as part of your daily lip care routine. Safety Information: Keep balm away from heat. Don’t forget to reapply frequently to maintain protection Overexposure to the sun is a serious health risk Don't use it on children under 3 years. Stop using it if any irritation develops. Contains Benzophenone-3 Package Contents: Each box contains one 10g tube of Carmex SPF 15 Classic Lip Balm, your new go-to for the best lip care. CARMEX Classic easy-squeezy tube with added SPF15 for soft, protected lips. Delish! Indications Helps to moisturise, relieve and provide colour to dry chapped lips. Ingredients Petrolatum, Lanolin, Cera Alba, Cetyl Esters, Paraffinum Liquidum, Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter, Camphor, Aroma, Menthol, Salicylic Acid, Vanillin, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Apply as often as you like - you know what to do! Great as a hydrating primer before, or a top coat after applying lipstick. And try not to lose me… Safety Warning For external use only. Box Contains 2 x Carmex Original Tube 10g See more
